# Sourdough Coach — one-page plan

**Idea:** an app that coaches home bakers through sourdough: track starter
feedings, bake outcomes, and ambient conditions; the app learns what works in
*your* kitchen and adjusts guidance.

**Users:** individual home bakers. Their data is theirs.

**Data:** starter feedings (moment), bakes (duration, with outcome rating),
kitchen temperature (numeric series), photos of crumb (files).

**Assumptions:** bakers will log consistently if logging is one tap; guidance
gets meaningfully better with 10+ bakes of history.

**Revenue:** subscription after 3 free bakes.
